creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 186712
xcape.patch

New port for a tiny little useful X11 utility https://github.com/alols/xcape that lets you e.g. make pressing Control on its own press Escape (for vim users), make Shift keys insert parens (like in this famous Mac setup: http://stevelosh.com/blog/2012/10/a-modern-space-cadet/#shift-parentheses)
